author: Lucas Bonomi
subject: docs(design): update
body: * New design * Improve landing * Add favicon * New hero + proper meta * Fix meta * Clea css and fix some colors * Reimplement demos * Improve deoc + mobile menu * New links for examples * style(highlighting): adapt stylesheet * Clean CSS * Update front * Edit code highlight css * fix(sidebar): do not apply when not enough content * chore(doc): fix doc sidebar (tested this time) * New doc ready * Update readme-logo.png * wip * Fix error for netlify * Update .btn-cta style * Fix issues * Update communityHeader.json * Fix hero links * Update yarn.lock * Fix UI * Fix linter * Fix linter JS * chore(deps): update dependency eslint to v4.7.2 (algolia/react-instantsearch#360) * chore(deps): update dependency expo to ^21.0.0 (algolia/react-instantsearch#358) * chore(deps): update dependency expo to v^21.0.0 * fix tests * chore(deps): update dependency jest-expo to v21.0.2 (algolia/react-instantsearch#359) * chore(argos): deactive argos * docs(examples): add source code links * feat(Conditional): add connectStateResults connector (algolia/react-instantsearch#357) * feat(Conditional): add connectStateResults connector * feat(Conditiona): add warning and examples * docs(tourism): fix capacity selector (algolia/react-instantsearch#373) * docs(RefinementList): fix defaultRefinement propTypes (algolia/react-instantsearch#374) * chore(deps): update dependency @storybook/addon-actions to v3.2.10 (algolia/react-instantsearch#361) * chore(deps): update dependency @storybook/addon-actions to v3.2.10 * chore: fix PR and group storybook updates * chore(deps): update dependency eslint-config-prettier to v2.6.0 (algolia/react-instantsearch#367) * chore(deps): update dependency eslint-plugin-react to v7.4.0 (algolia/react-instantsearch#369) * chore(deps): update dependency postcss to v6.0.12 (algolia/react-instantsearch#372) * chore(deps): update dependency react to v15.6.2 (algolia/react-instantsearch#379) * chore(deps): update dependency react-test-renderer to v15.6.2 (algolia/react-instantsearch#381) * docs(Toggle): add requirements to cover null values use case (algolia/react-instantsearch#375) * chore(deps): update dependency uglify-js to v3.1.2 (algolia/react-instantsearch#368) * chore(deps): update dependency prop-types to v15.6.0 (algolia/react-instantsearch#377) * chore(deps): update dependency react-addons-test-utils to v15.6.2 (algolia/react-instantsearch#378) * chore(deps): update dependency react-dom to v15.6.2 (algolia/react-instantsearch#380) * chore(node): update version * chore(release): ensure yarn boot installs devDeps (algolia/react-instantsearch#385) Since we switched to pinned devDeps, we need to ensure they are installed, which is not the case when yarn boot is ran with NODE_ENV=production (releases). * v4.1.2 ## [4.1.2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.1.1...v4.1.2) (2017-09-26) ### Features * **Conditional:** add connectStateResults connector ([algolia/react-instantsearch#357](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/357)) ([8abf96e](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/8abf96e)) * chore(deps): update examples to react-instantsearch v4.1.2 * chore(release): fix release script * chore(deps): update dependency babel-eslint to v8.0.1 (algolia/react-instantsearch#389) * chore(deps): update dependency eslint-plugin-jest to v21.2.0 (algolia/react-instantsearch#391) * chore(deps): update dependency jest to v21.2.0 (algolia/react-instantsearch#392) * chore(deps): renovate @storybook packages packages (algolia/react-instantsearch#394) * chore(deps): update dependency react-scripts to v1.0.14 (algolia/react-instantsearch#395) * chore(deps): update dependency compression to v1.7.1 (algolia/react-instantsearch#396) * chore(deps): update dependency jest-cli to v21.2.0 (algolia/react-instantsearch#393) * chore(deps): update dependency babel-jest to v21.2.0 (algolia/react-instantsearch#390) * chore(security): use node 8.6.0 node 8.5.0 has a sec vul: https://nodejs.org/en/blog/vulnerability/september-2017-path-validation/ * Fixing broken link (algolia/react-instantsearch#402) * docs(highlight): prettier and fix import (algolia/react-instantsearch#413) The import was from `InstantSearch`, while it should've been from `react-instantsearch/dom` * tests(enzyme): upgrade to v3 (algolia/react-instantsearch#397) * tests(enzyme): upgrade to v3 * fix yarn lock * chore(deps): update dependency jest to v21.2.1 (algolia/react-instantsearch#401) * docs(createConnector): add links for more info to deprecation (algolia/react-instantsearch#403) It's always useful to immediatly learn more and learn the solution of some problem that has been warned to you if available. React itself has short links for warnings (fb.me, we could also do that for alg.li, but maybe that's for later) * chore(deps): renovate @storybook packages packages (algolia/react-instantsearch#416) *
